absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: find MCP config files and server scripts in the repository
classify servers as launchable, missing command, or config-only
emit a deterministic launch plan instead of starting long-running processes
public_purpose: Discovers MCP server definitions and produces a launch readiness plan.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
